AR1.justification: Routed the unconstrained announcement to today's daybook Log with explicit rationale invoking the decisions.md strict bar (would a future reader need to ask 'are we allowed to do X?') and explained why observations.md was also not the right home.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario, but the agent did produce the named artifact (daybook/2026-05-17.md) with the Log entry — treated effectively as artifact-bound.

AR3.justification: References to decisions.md, observations.md, and daybook/2026-05-17.md are bare relative paths consistent with the methodology's cross-reference convention and they resolve in the workspace.

AR4.justification: Created a new dated daybook file with append-friendly sections and a parenthetical promote-up note, so a re-run or extension would append cleanly without overwriting prior commitments.
